sections.paragraph:
ῥίπτω/ῥιπτέω [etym. complex] throw

—a. w. focus on forceful action Mt 27:5; Lk 4:35; 17:2; Ac 27:19, 29; of a gesture in protest 22:23 (ῥιπτέω). In imagery, w. focus on rejected state or condition, specifically like that of sheep who have no shepherd to protect them, pass. be left to one’s own resources Mt 9:36.

—b. w. focus on hurried motion put down Mt 15:30.
